name: PolicyGen
headline: Privacy policy + terms generator (template-based)
subheadline: Compliant-ish docs in minutes. Built for indie devs, small sites, app makers.

tiers.name: Pro unlock
tiers.summary: Support the tool, unlock the extras.

cta.label: Use the free tool
cta.note: Free. No signup. Runs entirely in your browser.

seoDescription: Privacy policy + terms generator (template-based). Built for indie devs, small sites, app makers. Free to use.

faq.a: Indie devs, small sites, app makers. If that's you and "app stores/ads require policies" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Right now — everything on this page works immediately, free.
No. The tool runs 100% in your browser — nothing you type or upload ever leaves your device. You can verify in DevTools: zero network calls during use.

validationMetric: 200+ visits; target 25+ generations & 2+ Pro clicks in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <50 visits AND 0 Pro interest after 14 days
biggestRisk: Quality ceiling without an LLM; easy to clone; thin monetisation
first10: SEO long-tail + community answers; submit to tool directories; 1 launch post
